title: Phax Sirens
description: The Phax Sirens mod adds blocks of siren of different colors where each block can be configurable whether it is the sound emitted, the distance of the sound and even the configuration of the light intensity or if one wants or not the light
body:
Phax Sirens is the third mod created by Phax709, adding fully configurable, redstone-powered sirens and lights with multiple color variants to fit any build or situation.

Sirens and lights can be adjusted directly in-game via a configuration GUI, allowing players to customize sound volume, sound radius, looping behavior, light modes, blink speed, and brightness with ease.
